## Summary

- What changed:
- Why it helps the lecture/demo:

## Verification

- [ ] `make check`
- [ ] Rust service changes verified with `cargo fmt` and `cargo test`
- [ ] `make smoke` for runtime changes
- [ ] Documentation, `.env.example`, and scripts updated when behavior changed
- [ ] No real secrets, local volumes, downloaded models, or generated logs included

## Notes

Demo credentials are intentionally `admin` / `admin`. Do not include real secrets.
